3238330.name: Gravebind
3238330.description:
Gravebind is a classic isometric (2.5d) open world adventure RPG, while also planning to provide MMORPG and private multiplayer server modes, that will take you back to the 1990s, the golden age of gaming. If you are a fan of PC based RPGs of that era then you will likely fall in love with the nostalgia of this game. Enjoy a customizable character both visually and skillfully with an expanding set of skills to help aid you through a number of quests and exploration activities that the game has to offer in early access.

The story will take you through a medieval fantasy world that is approaching an apocalypse, blood moons send warning of coming evil and darkness. While trying to get away from the desolation of your own homeland you boarded a ship hoping to escape danger but instead storms at sea have forced your arrival in the mystical land known as Moonhaven; your destiny awaits you here! Arriving as just a stranger in this land you can progress through a series of quests that will gradually help you become the centerpiece in the story. Some quests will offer decision points and different ways to complete them that will affect future planned story parts.

One of the unique features Gravebind has to offer is the ability to customize various settings for your game world to adjust difficulty and offer greater re-playability. You can scale things like economics, quest difficulty, drop rates and we have plans to allow you to tailor the game play experience for how you may like to play an RPG.

Some of the other things we have planned for Gravebind are crafting, player customizable housing, 20 – 30 quests planned for this first chapter of the game with plans to offer purchasable game expansions for additional story and area of the game.

We plan to provide the private server multiplayer and public MMORPG open world server(s) for the game in the not to distant future once the single player mode features for the first chapter are complete, much of our development has been mindful of these modes and predeveloped to support them so that implementation will hopefully be quicker when the time comes.

We hope to provide you with regular game updates that will add features as we progress through the development of this game and we look forward to hearing your feedback as we add new features.
